sections.paragraph:
ζόφος, ου, ὁ (Hom., Trag. et al.; Plut., Lucian; Epict., Fgm. p. 487, 2 Sch.; Sym., Philo; Ath., R. 19 p. 71, 30).

① darkness ranging from partial to total state, with suggestion of foreboding, darkness, gloom Hb 12:18.

② esp. darkness of the nether regions, gloom (Od. 20, 356), and these regions themselves (Il. 15, 191; 21, 56; Od. 11, 57) ὁ ζόφος τοῦ σκότους either black darkness or the darkest nether regions 2 Pt 2:17; Jd 13 (the juxtaposition of ζ. and σκότος as Ael. Aristid. 24, 44 K.=44 p. 838 D.; Lucian, Catapl. 2); σειραὶ ζόφου chains of hell 2 Pt 2:4. ὑπὸ ζόφον in (lit. ‘under’) darkness (cp. Aeschyl., Pers. 839; Eur., Hipp. 1416.—Quint. Smyrn. 2, 619 ὑπὸ ζ. of the underworld) Jd 6. S. ταρταρόω.—DELG. M-M. TW.

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

Trag.

Trag. = writer (s) of tragedy

trag. = tragedy, writer (s) of tragedy

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

Lucian Lucian , II a.d.—List 5

Epict Epict , various works, I–II a.d.—List 5

Fgm. Fgm. = fragment, fragmentary

Sch. Sch. = TSchermann, Prophetarum vitae fabulosae—List 5

Sym. Sym. = Symmachus, Greek version of the OT—List 2, beg., 5

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Ath. Ath. = Athenagoras, II a.d.—List 5

esp. esp. = especially

Od Od , s. Hom.; VIII? b.c.—List 5

Il. Il. = Iliad, s. Hom.—List 5

Ael. Aristid. Ael. Aristid. = Aelius Aristides, II a.d.—List 5

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

lit. lit. = literal(ly); literature (refererences to [scholarly] literature)

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

Aeschyl Aeschyl , V b.c.—List 5

Eur Eur , V b.c.—List 5

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 429
